sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32095" key="e(kkaiebdomhkontaethri/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑκκαιεβδομηκοντᾰετηρίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n32095.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">period of seventy-six years,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1383.tlg001:8:59" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Gem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.59</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
